svg.text: Start-up (one-time) sequence followed by the repeating 100 µs real-time sampling task
arm 100 µs period, do not start
timer interrupt now live - real-time task takes over
This whole sequence runs once, to completion,
strictly before the timer is armed - the EEPROM
read must never happen from inside the ISR.
G / Y / R LED pins driven
ISR returns - waits for next 100 µs tick
Nothing in this path blocks or touches a bus -
the EEPROM is never read again after start-up,
which is what keeps this loop's jitter low.
